prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Receptacles & switches, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: GFCI missing in wet/kitchen/garage locations. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 406.4, 406.9.
title: Fault diagnosis: Receptacles & switches (residential job)
